overview: A student project service website where students log in, submit their academic information, choose their project type (handwritten or typed/graduation), and track the status of their project from submission through to ready for pickup. The service owner manages all submissions and updates statuses via an admin dashboard.
features: Project submission form with academic info (name, roll no, enrollment number, teacher, principal, class)
Project type selection: 10th/12th handwritten OR graduation typed (PDF only or PDF+binding)
Submission status tracking: submitted, in progress, ready for pickup
Student dashboard with past submissions and status badges
Admin dashboard for service owner to manage and update submission statuses
Submission detail view with full academic info and status history
Admin search and filter by student name, status, or project type
